name: Telegram Image to Veo Video AG

nodes.name: 📥 Trigger Gambar Telegram
nodes.notes: Gunakan credential bot VEO baru di node ini. Bot ini hanya untuk menerima gambar/prompt video, bukan approval caption.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.geminiInstruction }, { inlineData: { mimeType: $json.mimeType, data: $json.imageBase64 } }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.75, maxOutputTokens: 2500, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } } }}

nodes.name: 🤖 AI Agent Gemini 2.5 Pro
nodes.notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro memahami gambar Telegram. Jika caption kosong, agent membuat konsep video otomatis. Jika caption ada, agent mengembangkan prompt user.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { instances: [{ prompt: $json.veoPrompt, image: { bytesBase64Encoded: $json.imageBase64, mimeType: $json.mimeType } }], parameters: { sampleCount: 1, durationSeconds: $json.veoDurationSeconds, aspectRatio: $json.veoAspectRatio, generateAudio: $json.veoGenerateAudio, resolution: $json.veoResolution, negativePrompt: $json.negativePrompt, personGeneration: 'allow_adult' } } }}

nodes.name: 🎬 Generate Video Veo 3
nodes.notes: Model diminta oleh user: veo-3.0-generate-001. Endpoint Vertex AI predictLongRunning.
